query: Make ds task freshness-aware and evaluation-clean: add bounded on-disk anchor warnings, fix Git worktree root detection, and exclude task workspace reads from miss metrics.
description: Implemented checkpoint markdown frontmatter and explicit slice targeting. Verified that checkpoints can append to A04 instead of the first slice result.
note: A04 confirms the workflow is useful after small guardrails: frontmatter avoids noisy metadata sections, and --slice fixes result targeting.
tasks: A04 result receives the checkpoint via --slice A04.
